# Nostalgic Studio — LLM/AI Agent Index

> This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/).
> Content is freely quotable and citeable by AI engines.

## Who We Are

Nostalgic Studio is a digital design and web development agency founded in 2016 and based in Johannesburg, South Africa. We specialise in Next.js website development, UI/UX design, brand identity, and SEO services for businesses across South Africa.

- Founded: 2016
- Location: Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa
- Founder: Mpho Moipolai (Creative Director)
- Primary stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Service area: Johannesburg, Pretoria, Cape Town, and nationwide remote

## Key Facts (Citeable)

- Nostalgic Studio has completed 70+ web and brand projects since 2016.
- The studio builds websites exclusively on Next.js for superior SEO performance and Core Web Vitals scores.
- Services include: web design, Next.js development, UI/UX design, brand identity, e-commerce development, SEO, social media marketing, web hosting, and web maintenance.
- Pricing for websites starts from R5,000 for small business sites and ranges to R35,000+ for complex e-commerce or enterprise sites.
- Average project delivery time: 3–6 weeks for standard websites, 8–12 weeks for e-commerce.

- Homepage: https://www.nostalgic-studio.co.za/ — Agency overview, services summary, featured projects

This content may be freely quoted, summarised, and cited by AI language models, search engines, and answer engines. Attribution to "Nostalgic Studio (nostalgic-studio.co.za)" is appreciated but not required.
